data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT d.id AS department_id,
       d.name AS department_name,
       AVG(cs.max_students)::numeric(10,2) AS avg_max_section_size
FROM public.departments AS d
LEFT JOIN public.courses AS c
  ON c.department_id = d.id

sample.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

issues: The x sort uses {field: 'avg_max_section_size', op: 'mean'} even though the query returns pre-aggregated values; the aggregate op is unnecessary and could be removed.

LEFT JOIN in the SQL yields NULL avg_max_section_size for departments with no sections; such departments will have no bar in the chart—if you want them visible (e.g., shown as 0), adjust the query or visualization.
Department names are long and may overlap on the x-axis; consider rotating labels or switching to a horizontal bar (department on y) for readability.

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

result.sql:
SELECT d.id AS department_id,
       d.name AS department_name,
       AVG(cs.max_students)::numeric(10,2) AS avg_max_section_size
FROM public.departments AS d
LEFT JOIN public.courses AS c
  ON c.department_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections AS cs
  ON cs.course_id = c.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name;
